scenes.narration: It was the middle of the night. The disciples were alone in a boat on a dark and stormy sea.
scenes.image_prompt: Small wooden fishing boat on a stormy night sea, disciples gripping the sides with frightened faces, dark waves crashing, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: The waves were huge. The wind was fierce. These experienced fishermen were terrified.
scenes.image_prompt: Disciples struggling against giant waves at night, rain pouring down, lightning in the distance, desperate faces, colorful dramatic children's bible illustration

scenes.narration: Then they saw something coming toward them across the water. A figure. Walking. On the waves.
scenes.image_prompt: A glowing figure walking calmly on top of stormy dark water toward the disciples' boat, disciples pointing in shock and fear, dramatic colorful bible storybook art

scenes.narration: They thought it was a ghost. They screamed. But the figure called out — don't be afraid. It's me.
scenes.image_prompt: Jesus walking calmly on the water in glowing white robes, hand raised in reassurance, wind and waves around him not affecting him, warm light, colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: Peter said — Lord, if it's really you, let me walk to you on the water. And Jesus said — come.
scenes.image_prompt: Peter standing up in the boat looking at Jesus, one foot over the edge, a look of determined faith on his face, dramatic stormy night, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Peter stepped out. And he walked. On water. Toward Jesus.
scenes.image_prompt: Peter walking on water toward Jesus, amazed look on his face, the other disciples watching in disbelief from the boat, bright glowing scene, colorful bible storybook art

scenes.narration: But then Peter looked at the waves. He got scared. And he started to sink.
scenes.image_prompt: Peter beginning to sink into the water, arms flailing, look of panic on his face, waves rising around him, Jesus visible nearby, dramatic colorful illustration

scenes.narration: He cried out — Lord, save me! And instantly, Jesus reached out His hand and caught him.
scenes.image_prompt: Jesus reaching down and grasping Peter's hand, pulling him up from the water, warm golden light surrounding them, stormy sea calming, colorful hopeful bible illustration

scenes.narration: Jesus said — why did you doubt? When they got in the boat, the storm stopped completely.
scenes.image_prompt: Jesus and Peter stepping into the boat together, the storm instantly calm, disciples kneeling in wonder and worship, beautiful starry night sky, colorful storybook art

scenes.narration: Keep your eyes on Jesus. The moment you look at the storm instead... you start to sink.
scenes.image_prompt: Peter and Jesus standing together on calm water at night, stars reflecting on the surface, disciples watching from the peaceful boat, warm golden glow, beautiful bible storybook illustration
